@graph.name: RakeshInfo Notes
@graph.description: Free Engineering & College Study Materials Sharing Hub

mainEntity.name: What type of study notes are available on RakeshInfo Notes?

acceptedAnswer.text: RakeshInfo Notes offers a wide range of academic study materials, including engineering class notes, lecture summaries, lab manuals, and visual diagram sheets.

mainEntity.name: How do I secure my upload files and folders?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can add password protection to files inside folders or screenshots uploaded to the gallery. Enter a password before saving to secure them, locking access to anyone without the key.

mainEntity.name: Can I export notes to markdown or other formats?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Each open note can be downloaded as a Markdown (.md) document directly by clicking the download icon.
No. Finalizing a note locks it into a permanent state. This ensures lecture notes or exam solutions remain safe and tamper-proof.
